mapper.sql: comment_id, root_comment_id, note_id, author_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, content, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (root_comment_id, note_id, author_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, content, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{rootCommentId}, #{noteId}, #{authorId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{replyCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT c. FROM comment c INNER JOIN ( SELECT comment_id FROM comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND (parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id = 0)
ORDER BY like_count DESC, reply_count DESC, created_at DESC, comment_id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, comment_id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset} ) t ON c.comment_id = t.comment_id
ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.reply_count DESC, c.created_at DESC, c.comment_id DESC
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.comment_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND (parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id = 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = reply_count - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND reply_count > 0
